title: Sego Review Artifact
description: The persisted review artifact written to .sego/reviews/{id}.json. This is the canonical on-disk representation produced by Sego's code review workflow. Aligned with Rust struct ReviewArtifact in runtime/src/code_review/report.rs.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Current version is 1.

created_at_epoch_seconds.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the review was created.

diff_hash.description: Hash of the reviewed diff (binds review/verify/ship to the same code state).

finding_count.description: Number of findings. Must equal findings.length.

highest_severity.description: Highest severity among findings, or null if no findings. Optional in older artifacts.

git_status.description: Git status snapshot at review time (e.g. '## main...origin/main').

raw_text.description: Raw model output text before parsing into findings.

reviewer.description: Local trust metadata identifying the review engine that produced this artifact (for example, sego). Optional for older artifacts. This is not a cryptographic signature.

engine_version.description: Sego engine version that wrote the artifact. Optional for older artifacts.

review_mode.description: Review mode used to produce the artifact, for example model_code_review. Optional for older artifacts.

parse_error.description: Optional parse error diagnostic when parsing was attempted but failed or repaired.

parse_repair.description: Optional parse repair/extraction mode used while parsing model output.

severity.description: Review finding severity (snake_case, aligned with Rust ReviewSeverity).

parse_status.description: How the model output was parsed (aligned with Rust ReviewParseStatus).

finding.description: A single structured review finding (aligned with Rust ReviewFinding).

id.description: Finding identifier (e.g. 'f-001'). Has serde default; may be absent in legacy artifacts.

file.description: File path relative to workspace root.

line.description: Line number, or null if not applicable.

evidence.description: Code snippet or evidence supporting the finding.

risk.description: Risk description if the finding is not addressed.

verification_hint.description: Optional hint for how to verify the finding.

evidence_status.description: Optional evidence gate status. Absent or null for legacy artifacts.
Evidence gate status attached by Sego when deterministic validation was possible.
